roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/X MAT LISCOVITZ, APPEARING WITH DEFENDANT,/INTC/TWS/CH6 CJ 2D/CTS 2/VF250/COA:40/ICNA/X:CR-115 SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT/CTORD:FINES AND FEESSTAYED,/4019HALF/REMA/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITOR REMOVED/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 6, PC 32, A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/ /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 6/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 03-10-21 (30TH)/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BEPLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WEAP/WS/SA4: THE AREA BOUND BY MCALISTER, JONES, GEARY AND LARKIN STREETS, SF, CA/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 1 HOUR/DOP/
